recommendations.title: The Conspiracy
recommendations.overview: A documentary about conspiracy theories takes a horrific turn after the filmmakers uncover an ancient and dangerous secret society.

recommendations.title: Hot Seat
recommendations.overview: An ex-hacker is forced to break into high-level banking institutions, another man must try to penetrate the booby-trapped building to get the young man off the hot seat.

recommendations.title: Compadres
recommendations.overview: A disgruntled Mexican cop is forced to work with a teenage hacker to hunt down the criminals who killed his wife, and dismantle their operation.

recommendations.title: Fabricated City
recommendations.overview: In real life, Kwon Yoo is unemployed, but in the virtual game world he is the best leader. Kwon Yoo is then framed for a murder. With the help of hacker Yeo-wool, he tries to uncover the truth behind the murder case.

recommendations.title: Sword Art Online the Movie - Progressive - Aria of a Starless Night

recommendations.title: Takedown
recommendations.overview: Kevin Mitnick is quite possibly the best hacker in the world. Hunting for more and more information, seeking more and more cyber-trophies every day, he constantly looks for bigger challenges. When he breaks into the computer of a security expert and

recommendations.title: Smilla's Sense of Snow
recommendations.overview: Smilla Jaspersen attempts to understand the death of a small boy who falls from the roof of her apartment building. Suspecting wrongdoing, Smilla uncovers a trail of clues leading towards a secretive corporation that has made several mysterious exped

recommendations.title: Fugitive at 17
recommendations.overview: Suspected of murdering her best friend, a teenage computer-hacker goes on the run to find the real killer.

recommendations.title: Journey into Fear
recommendations.overview: An American ballistics expert in Turkey finds himself targeted by Nazi agents. Safe passage home by ship is arranged for him, but he soon discovers that his pursuers are also on board.

recommendations.title: Sneakers
